leadText: Aqua Tail (Japanese: アクアテール Aqua Tail) is a damage-dealing Water-type move introduced in Generation IV.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Aqua Tail deals damage and has no secondary effect. Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Arceus [ edit | edit source ] Aqua Tail's base power has been lowered to 85. Pokémon Legends: Arceus Category Physical PP 10 Agile Strong Power 85 65 105 Accuracy 90% 90% 100% Action speed modifier Self 0 0 +5 Target 0 +3 0 Additional effect ? ? ? ? ? ? None

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt HG SS PBR B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V The user attacks by swinging its tail as if it were a vicious wave in a raging storm.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD T D S Inflicts damage on the target. B S L てきポケモンに ダメージをあたえる Conq. The user attacks by swinging its tail as if it were a vicious wave in a raging storm. MD GtI S MD MD RT DX It damages an enemy.
